def negative_pydantic_validation_error_detail_forwarded_with_internal_field_aliases():
    rule_id = "pydantic_validation_error_detail_forwarded_with_internal_field_aliases"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Raw Pydantic .errors() detail forwarded to the API client, potentially exposing internal field aliases."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
